evals.prompt: Find 20 fintech Twitter influencers we could partner with for Acme Pay (acme.com).
evals.expected_output: A ranked markdown table of Twitter/X influencers with name, handle URL, followers, engagement rate, fit reason, top tweet, and contact info, produced by running the routed MPP pipeline.
assertions: Brand.dev is used to resolve the company before discovery
Exa search/findSimilar are used to discover curated listicles (not direct x.com search)
Scrape Creators profile and user-tweets endpoints are used for engagement metrics
The final output is a ranked table with at least one contact-enrichment column (email or LinkedIn)
Every paid call is routed MPP via the SELAT Router

evals.prompt: Build an influencer outreach list for the brand at vercel.com in the developer-tools niche.
evals.expected_output: The skill resolves the brand by domain via Brand.dev retrieve, then discovers and ranks dev-tools creators on X.
assertions: Brand.dev /v1/brand/retrieve is called with the supplied domain
The query/niche context is threaded into Exa and Fiber discovery
Output ranks candidates by relevance and engagement

evals.prompt: I have a shortlist of creators with their LinkedIn URLs — find emails for them.
evals.expected_output: The skill runs the contact-enrichment waterfall (Fiber kitchen-sink by LinkedIn URL, Hunter email-finder, Tomba linkedin-to-email) and returns emails plus LinkedIn URLs.
assertions: Fiber kitchen-sink is called with profileIdentifier set to a LinkedIn URL
Hunter email-finder is called as a POST with first_name, last_name, and domain
Tomba /v1/linkedin is used to resolve a LinkedIn URL to an email

evals.prompt: What does a single full run of this skill cost at most?
evals.expected_output: A full run is capped at $0.22, the sum of the per-step maxAmount caps rounded up.
assertions: Top-level maxAmount in manifest.json equals "0.22"
The sum of per-step maxAmount values is 0.213
Each step declares its own maxAmount cap

evals.prompt: Which payment rail does the influencer-finder skill use?
evals.expected_output: Every step is routed MPP through the SELAT Router; there are no direct Circle-nanopayment steps.
assertions: Every step in manifest.json has rail "routed"
metadata.rail in SKILL.md is "routed"
The skill notes it requires a reachable SELAT Router (SELAT_ROUTER_URL)

evals.prompt: How do I validate the endpoints without paying?
evals.expected_output: Use selat-pay --probe-only to send free 402 probes against each endpoint.
assertions: The validation guidance uses selat-pay with the --probe-only flag
Probe commands cover Brand.dev, Exa, Scrape Creators, Hunter, and Tomba
No probe command performs an actual payment
